primary.$description: Deep navy — primary brand color (slightly darker than dark variant for light-mode contrast)

primary-tint.$description: Lighter tint of the Deep Ocean light primary

primary-shade.$description: Darker shade of the Deep Ocean light primary

accent.$description: Teal — primary accent on light surfaces

on-accent.$description: Foreground for content placed over accent-colored surfaces

on-primary.$description: Foreground for content placed over primary-colored fills

active.$description: Foreground active state — equals brand.primary. SealStateColor(primary).active

disabled.$description: Foreground disabled state — brand.primary at 40% opacity. SealStateColor(primary).disabled: alpha = floor(0.4 × 255) = 0x66

active.$description: Fill active state — equals brand.primary. SealStateColor(primary).active

disabled.$description: Fill disabled state — brand.primary at 40% opacity. SealStateColor(primary).disabled: alpha = floor(0.4 × 255) = 0x66
